text:
desired.
01 = Able to use a specially adapted telephone (i.e., large numbers on the dial, teletype phone for the deaf) and call essential numbers.
02 = Able to answer the telephone and carry on a normal conversation but has difficulty with placing calls.
03 = Able to answer the telephone only some of the time or is able to carry on only a limited conversation.
04 = Unable to answer the telephone at all but can listen if assisted with equipment.
05 = Totally unable to use the telephone.
NA = NA
